label: general GPU SoC
note: full ONNX op-set, mixed precision, native TopK/ArgMin/Gather — the kNN-vs-bank tail runs end-to-end on-device. The only substrate that ships PatchCore whole.

instances.name: jetson_orin_nx
instances.label: Jetson Orin NX (TensorRT)
instances.sources: S13 (50 dense / 100 sparse int8 TOPS), S12 (8–16 GiB LPDDR5X)
instances.note: 50 DENSE int8 TOPS — the honest roofline rate (the 100 TOPS headline is 2:4 SPARSE, which our dense models do not exploit); float_tops = 25 (fp16 tensor, ~half int8 on Ampere) for the fp32/non-int8 option. Full ONNX + native TopK/ArgMin: runs PatchCore lookup end-to-end, no host tail. (Orin Nano 67 sparse / AGX Orin 170 sparse are the SKU bookends.)
